title: dahlia australis var. serratior
intro: Dahlia australis var. serratior, also known as the shrubby dahlia, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dahlia family. This plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Dahlia australis var. serratior include its potential to treat wounds, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its ability to lower fever and reduce pain. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a tea, tincture, or ointment to utilize its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
